---
title: "IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School Day 2: Entity Linking (Dinesh Garg)"
description: "Improving over BLINK SOTA on low-data regime; multi-task with type prediction. Zero-shot entity linking."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-08-12"
categories: [NLP, NLU, knowledge graphs, conference, paper]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School 2022. Image from [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](02.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](03.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](04.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](05.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](06.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](07.jpg)
:::
IBM NeuroSymbolicAI Summer School 2022 Day 2: Neuro-Symbolic Techniques for Entity Linking given by Dinesh Garg:

* Improving over BLINK SOTA on low data regime
* Multi-task with addition on type prediction

G P Shrivatsa Bhargav, Dinesh Khandelwal, Saswati Dana, Dinesh Garg, Pavan Kapanipathi, Salim Roukos, Alexander Gray, and L Venkata Subramaniam 2022. "Zero-Shot Entity Linking with Less Data." In Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: NAACL 2022, 1681–97. Seattle, United States: Association for Computational Linguistics. <https://aclanthology.org/2022.findings-naacl.127/>

Summer School site: <https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_ibm-neurosymbolicai-entitylinking-activity-6963922866723573760-I6Lp).*
